title: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman and French President Emmanuel Macron. (File/SPA/AFP)

snapshot.title: Saudi crown prince, Macron emphasize importance of freedom of navigation during call
snapshot.description: RIYADH: Saudi Crown Prince and French President Emmanuel Macron emphasised the importance of ensuring freedom of navigation during a phone call on Sunday. They also discussed supporting diplomatic efforts to de-escalate tension in the region and the latest updates regarding the memorandum of understanding signed between the US and Iran, the Saudi Press Agency reported. A
snapshot.author: Arab News
snapshot.pageTitle: Saudi crown prince, Macron emphasize importance of freedom of navigation during call | Arab News
